title: Global boundedness and normalized solutions to a $p$-Laplacian equation
summary: In the paper, we prove the existence of radial solutions to \begin{equation}\notag%\label{main-eq-abstarct} %\begin{aligned} -Δ_p u+({\rm sgn}(p-s)+V(x))|u|^{p-2}u+λ|u|^{s-2}u=|u|^{q-2}u\qquad\text{in}\,\R^N \\ %\int_{\R^N}|u|^sdx&=ρ^s %\end{aligned} \end{equation} with prescribed $L^s(\R^N)$-norm, where $N\ge 3,\,p\in[2,N),\,s\in(1,p],\,q\in(p\frac{N+s}{N},\frac{Np}{N-p})$ and $V:\R^N\to\R$ is a suitable radial potential. We stress that $V$ is required to be radial but not necessarily bounded, and there are no assumptions about its sign. The case $V\equiv 0$ is also included. The proof is variational and relies on a min-max argument. A key-tool is the Pohozaev identity, which is shown to be true for any solution under quite weak assumptions about the potential $V$. This identity is proved with the aid of a new global boundedness result for subsolutions to a suitable $p$-Laplace equation.

AI.tldr: 证明了带L^s范数约束的p-Laplace方程径向解的存在性，其中势函数V可以是无界且符号任意的径向函数
AI.motivation: 研究带L^s范数约束的p-Laplace方程径向解的存在性问题，其中势函数V可以是无界且符号任意的径向函数，包含V≡0的特例
AI.techniques: 变分方法、min-max论证、Pohozaev恒等式、p-Laplace方程下解的全局有界性结果
AI.main_theorems: 在适当条件下证明了带L^s范数约束的p-Laplace方程径向解的存在性，其中势函数V可以是无界且符号任意的径向函数
AI.significance: 推广了带范数约束的p-Laplace方程解的存在性理论，允许更一般的势函数条件，为相关非线性椭圆方程研究提供了新工具

title: Pulse-response analysis of a simple reaction-advection-diffusion equation
summary: We undertake a detailed analysis of a reaction-advection-diffusion (RAD) equation from the viewpoint of pulse-response studies, with particular attention to effects due to the advection velocity. Our boundary-value problem is a mathematical model for a system consisting of a narrow reactor tube into which a short pulse of reactant gas is injected at one end and a mixture of reaction product and unreacted gas flows out at the opposite end. Exit flow properties such as moments and peak characteristics are obtained analytically as functions of the Péclet number. The description of a standard transport curve\ -- -including diffusion and advection but no reaction\ -- -can serve as the baseline for further characterization of chemical activity. This characterization is done here for a first order irreversible reaction. Among our main observations is that chemical activity is easily obtained from the ratio of the exit flow curve in the presence of reaction over the standard transport curve.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过脉冲响应方法分析反应-对流-扩散方程，建立了化学活性与Péclet数之间的解析关系。
AI.motivation: 研究窄反应管中脉冲注入反应气体的系统，建立数学模型分析出口流动特性，特别关注对流速度对反应-对流-扩散过程的影响。
AI.techniques: 采用脉冲响应研究方法，解析求解反应-对流-扩散方程的边界值问题，利用矩分析和峰值特性分析，建立化学活性与标准输运曲线的比值关系。
AI.main_theorems: 获得了出口流动特性（矩和峰值特征）作为Péclet数的解析函数；建立了化学活性与标准输运曲线的简单比值关系；为一阶不可逆反应提供了完整的表征方法。
AI.significance: 为反应器设计和化学过程分析提供了理论框架，建立了化学活性与输运特性之间的直接联系，简化了反应系统的实验表征方法。

title: Nonradial linear stability of liquid Lane-Emden stars
summary: The classical model of a star is the Lane-Emden star with dynamics governed by the Euler-Poisson equations. We consider the case of a liquid star with a "stiffened gas" equation of state $p=ρ^γ-1$. We derive the full 3D linearised Euler-Poisson system around liquid Lane-Emden stars with no symmetry assumptions on the perturbations and show that the associated linear operator $\mathbf L$ is non-negative whenever the radial mode is non-negative. We show that $\mathbf L$ has an infinite-dimensional kernel each element of which corresponds to a linearly growing solution to the linearised system. When restricted to irrotational perturbations and modding out the three kernel elements corresponding to momentum conservation, however, we prove that $\mathbf L$ is strictly positive with coercivity bound $\langle\mathbf L\boldsymbolθ,\boldsymbolθ\rangle_{\barρ}\gtrsim\|\boldsymbolθ\|_{L^2(B_R)}^2$. Hence we demonstrate that the liquid Lane-Emden stars are stable against non-radial irrotational perturbations whenever the purely radial mode is stable, improving upon previous results that dealt only with purely radial perturbations. However, the stability might not be as strong as one might hope, as we prove that $\|\nabla\boldsymbolθ\|_{L^2(B_R)}^2$ cannot be controlled even in this case.

AI.tldr: 证明了液体Lane-Emden星体在非径向无旋扰动下的稳定性，条件是径向模式稳定。
AI.motivation: 研究经典Lane-Emden星体模型的稳定性问题，特别是液体星体在"硬化气体"状态方程下的动力学行为，旨在超越以往仅考虑径向扰动的研究。
AI.techniques: 线性化Euler-Poisson系统、谱分析、算子理论、变分方法、守恒律分析、无旋扰动限制。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 线性算子L非负当径向模式非负；2) L有无穷维核对应线性增长解；3) 限制于无旋扰动并模掉动量守恒对应的三个核元素后，L严格正且有强制性界；4) 无法控制梯度范数。
AI.significance: 首次证明了液体Lane-Emden星体在非径向无旋扰动下的稳定性，将稳定性分析从纯径向扰动扩展到更一般的扰动类型，但揭示了稳定性可能不够强（梯度无法控制）。

title: Co-moving volumes and the Reynolds transport theorem for two-phase flows
summary: We consider the local kinematics at fluid interfaces in two-phase flows within the sharp interface framework. In the considered case with phase change and slip at the interface, the governing velocity field is discontinuous at the phase boundary with possible jumps of the normal and the tangential components. This causes the associated initial value problems for the kinematic differential equation, governing the motion of fluid elements, to be ill-posed in general. Motivated by a corresponding example, where the velocity field is physically consistent regarding the balance of mass and momentum as well as the entropy inequality, we employ concepts from differential inclusions, to rigorously define co-moving sets within this framework. Based on this general two-phase flow setting, we proof a natural extension of the Reynolds transport theorem to this case.

AI.tldr: 将雷诺输运定理推广到具有相变和滑移的间断速度场两相流界面
AI.motivation: 研究具有相变和滑移的两相流界面局部运动学，当速度场在相边界处出现法向和切向分量间断时，运动学微分方程的初值问题通常不适定，需要建立严格的数学框架
AI.techniques: 采用微分包含概念，在尖锐界面框架下定义共运动集，建立严格的数学分析框架
AI.main_theorems: 证明了雷诺输运定理在具有相变和滑移的间断速度场两相流中的自然推广
AI.significance: 为具有相变和滑移的两相流界面运动学提供了严格的数学基础，扩展了经典输运定理的应用范围，对多相流建模和数值模拟有重要理论意义

title: Well-posedness and mean-field limit of discontinuous weighted dynamics via the relative entropy method
summary: We consider deterministic particle dynamics with time evolving weights and their associated Kolmogorov equation and mean-field equation. We prove existence and unique- ness for the limit PDE alongside estimates on the growth of the logarithmic gradient as well as existence of weak solutions for the Kolmogorov equation satisfying an appropriate entropy inequality. We then apply these estimates and the relative entropy method as developed in [17], in order to derive the associated equation as a mean field limit. Our results cover both interactions and influence kernels with mild regularity assumptions.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有时变权重的确定性粒子系统的Kolmogorov方程和平均场方程的存在唯一性，并推导了平均场极限
AI.motivation: 研究具有时变权重的确定性粒子动力学系统，这类系统在统计物理、群体动力学和机器学习中有广泛应用，需要建立其数学理论基础，特别是Kolmogorov方程和平均场极限的严格分析
AI.techniques: 使用对数梯度增长估计、熵不等式、相对熵方法、弱解理论，以及处理具有温和正则性假设的相互作用核和影响核
AI.main_theorems: 1) 极限PDE的存在唯一性定理；2) 对数梯度增长估计；3) Kolmogorov方程弱解的存在性及满足适当熵不等式；4) 平均场极限的推导结果
AI.significance: 为具有时变权重的粒子系统提供了严格的数学框架，扩展了平均场极限理论的应用范围，对理解复杂系统的集体行为有重要理论意义，在机器学习中的神经网络训练等应用中有潜在价值

title: On non-uniqueness of mild solutions and stationary singular solutions to the Navier-Stokes equations
summary: We prove that the unconditional uniqueness of mild solutions to the Navier-Stokes equations fails in all the Besov spaces with negative regularity index, by constructing non-trivial stationary singular solutions via convex integration. We also establish uniqueness of stationary weak solutions in an endpoint critical space. Similar results are proved for the fractional Navier-Stokes equations with arbitrarily large power of the Laplacian in both Lebesgue and Besov spaces.

AI.tldr: 证明了Navier-Stokes方程在负正则性Besov空间中无条件唯一性失效，并构造了非平凡稳态奇异解
AI.motivation: 研究Navier-Stokes方程在临界空间中的唯一性问题，特别是在负正则性Besov空间中，探讨解的唯一性条件
AI.techniques: 凸积分方法构造非平凡稳态奇异解，临界空间分析，端点空间唯一性证明
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在负正则性Besov空间中无条件唯一性失效；2. 构造了非平凡稳态奇异解；3. 在端点临界空间中建立了稳态弱解的唯一性；4. 将结果推广到分数阶Navier-Stokes方程
AI.significance: 揭示了Navier-Stokes方程在负正则性空间中的唯一性限制，为理解流体方程解的结构提供了新视角，对临界空间理论有重要贡献

title: Linearized Stability of Non-Isolated Equilibria of Quasilinear Parabolic Problems in Interpolation Spaces
summary: The stability of non-isolated equilibria to quasilinear parabolic problems of the form $u' = A(u)u + f(u)$ is established in interpolation spaces (and thus extending previous results relying on maximal regularity). The approach allows full flexibility in choosing the interpolation methods and requires only low regularity assumptions on the semilinear part $f$. Applications to concrete problems are presented, including the capillarity-driven Hele--Shaw problem and the fractional mean curvature flow.

AI.tldr: 建立了拟线性抛物问题在插值空间中非孤立平衡点的稳定性理论，推广了以往依赖极大正则性的结果
AI.motivation: 拟线性抛物方程$u' = A(u)u + f(u)$的非孤立平衡点稳定性分析在以往研究中依赖于极大正则性理论，限制了应用范围和灵活性，需要发展更一般的理论框架
AI.techniques: 采用插值空间理论，允许完全灵活选择插值方法，仅需半线性部分$f$的低正则性假设，避免了传统极大正则性方法的限制
AI.main_theorems: 建立了拟线性抛物问题在一般插值空间中非孤立平衡点的稳定性定理，该结果不依赖于极大正则性，具有更广泛的适用性
AI.significance: 为拟线性抛物方程的稳定性分析提供了更灵活的理论框架，可直接应用于毛细管驱动的Hele-Shaw问题和分数平均曲率流等具体问题，推动了抛物型偏微分方程稳定性理论的发展

title: Liouville phenomenon for the Klein-Gordon equation
summary: We study the Klein-Gordon equation in one spatial and one temporal dimension. Physically, this equation describes the wave function of a relativistic spinless boson with positive rest mass. Mathematically, this is the most elementary hyperbolic partial differential equation, after the wave equation itself. Relative to the origin, the spacetime splits according to the light cones, and we find four quarter-planes, two of which are timelike while the remaining two are spacelike. Not unexpectedly, the solutions behave quite differently in the two types of quarter-planes. It turns out that the spacelike quarter-planes exhibit a Liouville phenomenon, where insufficient growth forces the solutions to display a certain kind of symmetry, where the values on the two linear edges are in a one-to-one relation. This phenomenon shares features with the classical Liouville theorem as well as the Phragmen-Lindelof principle for harmonic functions.

AI.tldr: 研究一维Klein-Gordon方程在时空不同区域中的解的性质，发现类空间区域存在Liouville现象
AI.motivation: 研究最简单的双曲偏微分方程之一——Klein-Gordon方程，该方程描述具有正静止质量的无自旋玻色子的波函数，在相对论量子力学中具有基础重要性
AI.techniques: 利用时空的光锥结构分析，将时空分为四个象限（两个类时区域和两个类空区域），采用Liouville定理和Phragmen-Lindelof原理的分析方法
AI.main_theorems: 发现类空间象限存在Liouville现象：当解的增长不足时，解必须表现出某种对称性，使得两个线性边界上的值存在一一对应关系
AI.significance: 揭示了Klein-Gordon方程解在类空区域的新奇性质，连接了经典Liouville定理和调和函数的Phragmen-Lindelof原理，为双曲方程理论提供了新视角

title: From maximal entropy exclusion process to unitary Dyson Brownian motion and free unitary hydrodynamics
summary: We investigate the Maximal Entropy Simple Symmetric Exclusion Process (MESSEP) on a discrete ring with L sites and N indistinguishable particles. Its eigenfunctions are Schur polynomials evaluated at the L-th roots of unity, yielding an explicit spectral decomposition. The analysis relies on this eigenstructure and on the link between Schur polynomials and irreducible characters of the symmetric group, which forms the core algebraic tool for the scaling limits.  In the low-density regime, where N is fixed and L tends to infinity, the rescaled dynamics converge to the Unitary Dyson Brownian Motion (UDBM). The electrostatic repulsion then emerges as an entropic force, providing a canonical microscopic derivation of the UDBM.  In the hydrodynamic regime, where N is equivalent to $α$L with $α$ P p0, 1q, the empirical measure converges to a density solving a nonlinear, nonlocal transport equation. Its moment generating function satisfies a complex Burgers-type equation. As $α$ tends to 0, this equation coincides with that governing the spectral distribution of the Free Unitary Brownian Motion (FUBM), thereby bridging discrete entropic exclusion dynamics and free unitary hydrodynamics.  Overall, the MESSEP provides a unified canonical discrete framework connecting unitary Dyson motion and free unitary Brownian motion through nonlinear hydrodynamic limits, with Schur and character theory as the central algebraic structure.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过最大熵简单对称排他过程(MESSEP)建立了离散环上粒子系统与酉Dyson布朗运动及自由酉布朗运动之间的统一理论框架。
AI.motivation: 研究离散环上具有最大熵的简单对称排他过程，旨在建立微观粒子系统与随机矩阵理论中酉Dyson布朗运动及自由酉布朗运动之间的数学联系。
AI.techniques: 利用Schur多项式在单位根处的取值作为特征函数，结合对称群不可约特征标的代数理论，进行尺度极限分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 低密度极限下，重标度动力学收敛到酉Dyson布朗运动；2. 流体动力学极限下，经验测度收敛到满足非线性非局部输运方程的密度；3. 当密度趋于零时，该方程与自由酉布朗运动的谱分布方程一致。
AI.significance: 为随机矩阵理论与统计物理之间建立了统一的离散框架，揭示了静电排斥作为熵力的微观机制，连接了经典Dyson运动与自由概率论中的酉布朗运动。

title: Rapid stabilization of general linear systems with F-equivalence
summary: We study the rapid stabilization of general linear systems, when the differential operator $\mathcal{A}$ has a Riesz basis of eigenvectors. We find simple sufficient conditions for the rapid stabilization and the construction of a relatively explicit feedback operator. We use an $F$-equivalence approach \textcolor{black}{relying on Fredholm transformation} to show a stronger result: under these sufficient conditions the system is equivalent to a simple exponentially stable system, with arbitrarily large decay rate. In particular, our conditions improve the existing conditions of rapid stabilization for non-parabolic operators such as skew-adjoint systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了具有Riesz基特征向量的一般线性系统的快速镇定问题，建立了简单的充分条件并构造了相对显式的反馈算子。
AI.motivation: 研究一般线性系统的快速镇定问题，特别是当微分算子A具有Riesz基特征向量时。现有快速镇定条件对非抛物算子（如斜伴随系统）不够理想，需要改进。
AI.techniques: 采用F-等价方法，依赖于Fredholm变换，将原系统等价转换为具有任意大衰减率的简单指数稳定系统。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了快速镇定的简单充分条件，构造了相对显式的反馈算子，证明了在满足这些条件下系统可等价于具有任意大衰减率的指数稳定系统。
AI.significance: 改进了非抛物算子（特别是斜伴随系统）的快速镇定条件，为一般线性系统的镇定控制提供了更有效的理论框架和方法。

title: Unweighted Hardy Inequalities on the Heisenberg Group and in Step-Two Carnot Groups
summary: We establish unweighted Hardy-type inequalities on step-two Carnot groups with one-dimensional vertical layer, with explicit lower bounds for the optimal Hardy constant. The approach is based on a quantitative integration-by-parts mechanism that replaces the non-horizontal Euler vector field by a suitably constructed horizontal vector field with controlled norm. As applications, we obtain fully explicit bounds in the Heisenberg group for both the Kor{à}nyi gauge and the Carnot--Carath{é}odory distance, and we extend the results to non-isotropic step-two structures through a generalized Kor{à}nyi-type homogeneous norm.

AI.tldr: 在具有一维垂直层的二阶Carnot群上建立了无权重Hardy型不等式，并给出了最优Hardy常数的显式下界
AI.motivation: 研究Carnot群上的Hardy不等式，特别关注二阶群（如Heisenberg群）中Hardy常数的最优下界估计问题
AI.techniques: 基于定量分部积分机制，用构造的水平向量场替代非水平Euler向量场，并控制其范数；推广Korányi型齐次范数到非各向同性结构
AI.main_theorems: 在具有一维垂直层的二阶Carnot群上建立了无权重Hardy型不等式，给出了最优Hardy常数的显式下界；在Heisenberg群中获得了Korányi规范和Carnot-Carathéodory距离的完全显式界
AI.significance: 为Carnot群上的Hardy不等式提供了新的定量结果，改进了现有下界估计，在次椭圆偏微分方程和几何分析中有重要应用

title: Wasserstein Gradient Flows of semi-discret energies: evolution of urban areas anduniform quantization
summary: We study the Wasserstein gradient flow of semi-discrete energies in the space of probability measures, that is functionals depending on two measures-one being an absolutely continuous density and the other an atomic measure. These energies appear naturally in the field of urban planning. This is done via the celebrated JKO scheme, for which we prove convergence to a limiting system composed of a parabolic PDE with singular advection coupled with an ODE, also presenting singular dynamics. This is first done under more general assumptions using classical tools, and in a second moment convergence is proven to hold in $L^2_tH^1_x$ for the cases of linear and Porous-Medium type diffusions. We then pass to the study of some qualitative properties of this system, such as the convergence of the atoms towards the baricenters of their corresponding Laguerre cells. We finish this work with extensive numerical simulations that aid in formulating conjectures for the qualitative behavior of this system; in the case of linear diffusion, for instance, we observe a dynamic crystallization phenomenon.

AI.tldr: 研究半离散能量在概率测度空间中的Wasserstein梯度流，建立了JKO格式收敛到奇异对流耦合ODE-PDE系统的理论
AI.motivation: 研究城市规划中自然出现的半离散能量（依赖于绝对连续密度和原子测度）的Wasserstein梯度流，这类能量在空间规划、设施选址等问题中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 使用JKO（Jordan-Kinderlehrer-Otto）格式，结合经典分析工具，在L²_tH¹_x空间中证明收敛性，采用数值模拟验证理论结果
AI.main_theorems: 证明了JKO格式收敛到由奇异对流抛物PDE与奇异动力学ODE耦合的系统；在线性扩散和多孔介质型扩散情形下，在L²_tH¹_x空间中建立收敛性；分析了原子向相应Laguerre单元重心收敛的定性性质
AI.significance: 为城市规划中的半离散优化问题提供了严格的数学框架，揭示了动态结晶现象，建立了梯度流理论与实际应用问题的桥梁，为相关领域提供了新的分析工具

title: Sharp regularity near the grazing set for kinetic Fokker-Planck equations
summary: We prove optimal regularity results for solutions to linear kinetic Fokker-Planck equations in bounded domains. Our contributions are two-fold. First, we establish the sharp $C^{1/2}$ regularity for either diffuse reflection or prescribed in-flow boundary conditions. Previously, in this setting, it was only known that solutions are $C^α$ for some small $α> 0$. Second, we provide a complete characterization of the solution behavior near the grazing set by proving higher order expansions beyond the critical regularity threshold of $\frac{1}{2}$. These results demonstrate for the first time that solutions maintain higher smoothness up to the grazing set near the incoming boundary.

AI.tldr: 证明了有界区域中线性动力学Fokker-Planck方程解的最优正则性，包括尖锐的C^{1/2}正则性和在掠射集附近的高阶展开
AI.motivation: 研究有界区域中线性动力学Fokker-Planck方程解的正则性问题，特别是边界条件（漫反射或规定流入）下的最优正则性，以及解在掠射集附近的行为特征
AI.techniques: 使用正则性理论、边界层分析、高阶展开方法，以及针对掠射集附近的精细分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了漫反射或规定流入边界条件下解的尖锐C^{1/2}正则性；2. 证明了在临界正则性阈值1/2之上的高阶展开，完整刻画了在掠射集附近的解行为
AI.significance: 首次证明了在有界区域中，解在掠射集附近保持更高的光滑性，为动力学方程的正则性理论提供了重要进展，对边界层分析和相关应用有重要意义

title: Harmonic functions on balls for x-dependent rectilinear stable processes
summary: We obtain sharp estimates for functions harmonic with respect to $x$-dependent rectilinear stable processes in balls, under the assumption that the Dirichlet exterior data are radial about the center. The main idea of the proof is based on the construction of global barrier functions for the $x$-dependent rectilinear fractional Laplacian in balls.

AI.tldr: 建立了球域中关于x依赖的直线稳定过程的调和函数的尖锐估计
AI.motivation: 研究x依赖的直线稳定过程（rectilinear stable processes）对应的分数阶拉普拉斯算子在球域中的调和函数估计问题，特别关注Dirichlet外边界数据为径向函数的情形
AI.techniques: 主要技术是构造球域中x依赖的直线分数阶拉普拉斯算子的全局障碍函数（global barrier functions）
AI.main_theorems: 获得了球域中关于x依赖的直线稳定过程的调和函数的尖锐估计，在Dirichlet外边界数据为径向函数的假设下
AI.significance: 为x依赖的非局部算子的调和函数理论提供了重要工具，扩展了分数阶拉普拉斯算子的经典结果，对非局部偏微分方程理论有重要意义

title: On Hamilton Jacobi equations with time measurable Hamiltonians posed on a 1-dimensional junction
summary: In this paper, we study evolutive Hamilton Jacobi equations with Hamiltonians that are discontinuous in time, posed on a simple network consisting of two edges on the real line connected at a single junction. We introduce a notion of (flux-limited) viscosity solution for Hamiltonians H=H(t,x,p) that are assumed to be only measurable in time t. The flux limiter, A=A(t), acting at the junction, is not required to be continuous but only in L infinity. In the case of convex Hamiltonians, we prove a comparison principle and establish an existence result via the construction of an optimal control problem. Generalisations to the nonconvex case and to more general networks are also discussed.

AI.tldr: 提出时变不连续Hamilton-Jacobi方程在简单网络上的通量限制粘性解理论，建立了比较原理和存在性结果
AI.motivation: 研究时间不连续的Hamilton-Jacobi方程在简单网络上的适定性问题，特别是Hamiltonian仅对时间可测且通量限制器不连续的情况
AI.techniques: 引入通量限制粘性解概念，利用最优控制问题构造解，建立比较原理，处理时间不连续性和网络结构
AI.main_theorems: 对于凸Hamiltonian情形，证明了比较原理和存在性定理；讨论了非凸情形和更一般网络的推广
AI.significance: 扩展了Hamilton-Jacobi方程理论到时间不连续情形和网络结构，为交通流、最优控制等应用提供理论基础

title: A Hydrodynamics Formulation for a Nonlinear Dirac Equation
summary: We derive a hydrodynamics formulation for a modified Dirac equation with a nonlinear mass term that preserves the homogeneity of the original Dirac equation. The nonlinear Dirac equation admits a symmetric split into the left and right-handed spinor components. It is formulated using Clifford algebra tools. We prove global existence for a regularized equation.

AI.tldr: 提出了具有非线性质量项的修正Dirac方程的流体力学表述，并证明了正则化方程的全局存在性
AI.motivation: 研究具有非线性质量项的Dirac方程，该质量项保持了原始Dirac方程的齐次性，旨在建立相应的流体力学表述并分析其数学性质
AI.techniques: 使用Clifford代数工具，将非线性Dirac方程对称分解为左旋和右旋旋量分量，采用正则化方法处理方程
AI.main_theorems: 推导了修正Dirac方程的流体力学表述，证明了正则化方程的全局存在性结果
AI.significance: 为非线性Dirac方程提供了新的流体力学视角，建立了数学严格性，可能在量子流体力学和相对论性流体力学中有应用

title: Incompressible limit for an age-structured tumor model
summary: In this paper, we consider an age-structured mechanical model for tumor growth. This model takes into account the life-cycle of tumor cells by including an age variable. The underlying process for tumor growth is the same as classical tumor models, where growth is driven by pressure-limited cell proliferation, and cell movement away from regions of high pressure. The main contribution of this paper is establishing the convergence of solutions of the age-structured model to a limit satisfying a Hele-Shaw free boundary problem. This limiting problem describes the geometric motion of the tumor as it grows according to a nonlinear Darcy's law.

AI.tldr: 建立了年龄结构肿瘤生长模型解收敛到Hele-Shaw自由边界问题的极限
AI.motivation: 研究年龄结构肿瘤生长模型，考虑肿瘤细胞生命周期中的年龄变量，旨在理解年龄结构如何影响肿瘤生长动力学及其极限行为
AI.techniques: 年龄结构偏微分方程分析、极限过程分析、自由边界问题理论、非线性Darcy定律、Hele-Shaw问题方法
AI.main_theorems: 证明了年龄结构肿瘤生长模型解收敛到满足Hele-Shaw自由边界问题的极限，该极限问题描述肿瘤按非线性Darcy定律生长的几何运动
AI.significance: 为年龄结构肿瘤模型提供了严格的数学基础，建立了微观年龄结构与宏观肿瘤生长几何之间的联系，对生物数学和自由边界问题理论有重要贡献
